## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No secrets, `.env.local`, database URLs, private user data, or production logs are included.
- [ ] User-entered dilemmas, uploads, owner tokens, hidden prompts, and hidden reasoning are not exposed.
- [ ] Any examples, fixtures, or WorldPacks are synthetic, public-domain, or otherwise safe to publish.
